hero.designNotes: Festive Gujarati elegance rendered through a warm cream-and-gold palette with maroon accents — no image needed. The layout uses an asymmetric three-column grid (decorative side pillars flanking a dominant center) that collapses gracefully on mobile. Typography leads with Rozha One for the oversized staggered bride/groom names rendered in a maroon-to-gold gradient, with Cormorant Garamond italics for the poetic invitation message. Cultural touchpoints include a glowing ॐ Ganesh invocation badge, floating ✦ petal particles with keyframe animations, diya/marigold/music emoji in the right column, and a dot-grid background pattern. The details strip uses a frosted glass pill treatment, and the dual CTAs contrast a deep maroon filled button against a ghost outline. Ambient radial glows pulse softly in the corners for depth. All decorative elements use pure CSS — no external assets.
